arts.ttl: Ireland can banish Wembley demons with Plovdiv plunder

It is a matter of courtesy among international managers to offer opponents respect before games, however, Hallgrimsson does appear to have a real appreciation of what the current manager is attempting to do with his side, and spoke about Bulgaria along the same lines of how he was hoping to set Ireland up against England at Wembley and focusing on the collective.

arts.ttl: League of Ireland fixture updates announced
arts.sum: In the SSE Airtricity Men’s Premier Division, the postponed Shamrock Rovers v Cork City fixture originally scheduled for Tallaght Stadium on Sunday, February 23 will now take place on Monday, April 14 at 20:00. In the SSE Airtricity Men’s First Division, the postponed UCD v Bray Wanderers fixture originally scheduled for the UCD Bowl on Friday, February 23 will now take place on Monday, March 31 at 19:45.

arts.ttl: Crawley part ways with ex-Ireland goalkeeper Elliot
arts.sum: Crawley have sacked manager Rob Elliot with the club facing an uphill battle to avoid relegation from League One. Elliot's assistant Louis Storey has been placed in charge on a temporary basis.

arts.ttl: Bulgaria v Republic of Ireland: All you need to know
arts.sum: Playing a side in and around our level over two competitive matches will be a big help for the Irish boss in trying to figure out his squad for World Cup qualifying. Despite winning just a handful of Nations League matches since the introduction of the competition, Ireland have managed to maintain League B status.

arts.ttl: Nations League: Predictions for all 12 games on Thursday
arts.sum: James Mason has looked over all 12 Nations League games taking place on Thursday and picked out a score prediction for each match.

arts.ttl: Relegation in mind as Ireland set for Bulgaria battle
arts.sum: And Hallgrimsson sees the match as an opportunity for the new or fringe players to step into the gaps left through injuries or suspensions and put themselves in the picture for the upcoming campaign with just three more games to play after Thursday night’s fixture. Looking ahead to the game, Hallgrimsson confirmed that the entire travelling squad are fit and available for selection, adding that the players are champing at the bit to be involved.

arts.ttl: Selection dilemmas as Republic of Ireland look to bounce back against Bulgaria
arts.sum: Heimir Hallgrimsson’s side play in Plovdiv on Thursday evening with decisions to make at both ends of the pitch.

arts.ttl: Preview: Bulgaria vs. Republic of Ireland - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's Nations League clash between Bulgaria and Republic of Ireland, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
